Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Jiuzhi Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Jiuzhi Technology Co., Ltd. is a classic 'single-person shell company in an old residential building' blindly slapped with the label of a major electronics manufacturing factory by the official classification system. The official commercial system directly assigned it to the heavy-asset 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing' simply because the words 'electronic and electrical product production' were written in its business license. However, the physical probe immediately punctured this industrial disguise: this is a twenty-year-old company established in 2003, with a paid-in capital of only 500,000 RMB, and its 2024 insured headcount is astonishingly only '1 person'! The most fatal demotion strike comes from its geographical coordinates: 'Room 201, Building 3, Huangli Xincun, Qinhuai District, Nanjing City.' 'Huangli Xincun' is an extremely typical old residential compound in the main urban area of Nanjing. On the second floor (Room 201) of an old residential building, with 1 employee, using 500,000 RMB to establish an assembly line to 'produce' electronic and electrical products? This not only severely violates physical common sense but would not even pass basic residential fire and environmental protection regulations. Reviewing the extremely brief latter half of its license: 'supporting sales of electronic components.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronics manufacturing plant; it is a pure One-Person Electronic Components Trading Shell operated out of an old residential building. The owner (Guan Zhihui) highly likely registered this company using their own residence, acting as a middleman within the industry or for issuing invoices.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 75)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / ONE-PERSON ELECTRONICS TRADING SHELL
